source.note: Support teammate: only team buffs are used by the evaluator. Combat hit definitions/multipliers can be added if a Xiangling-as-main leaderboard is ever needed. Base stats from GO allStat_gen (GROW_CURVE_HP_S4/ATTACK_S4 Lv90 = 8.349).

team_conditional_modifiers_json.description: A4 Beware, It's Super Hot!: when Guoba Attack's effects end, Guoba leaves a chili pepper; picking it up increases ATK by 10% for 10s.
C1 Crispy Outside, Tender Inside: opponents hit by Guoba's attacks have their Pyro RES reduced by 15% for 6s.
